channel.title: Guitars on hartsuiker-guitars
channel.description: Recent content in Guitars on hartsuiker-guitars

item.title: Build OHT-26001
item.description: A super fun electric guitar featuring a solid cypress body, a pau marfim neck, and chrome hardware. Finished with a natural oil finish to highlight the wood grain and feel.

item.title: Build OHT-26002
item.description: A fantastic guitar featuring a solid reclaimed Oregon Pine body from an old workbench, a pau marfim neck, and black hardware. Finished with a natural oil finish to highlight the wood grain and feel.

item.title: Spiral Bass
item.description: A custom solid-body bass featuring hand-carved ergonomic scrolls, a multi-laminate neck, and a split-coil configuration. Made entirely from reclaimed wood with a natural shellac finish.
